name: career-copilot
description: Career Copilot eval cases for structured reports, repository evidence, and grounded resume guidance.

cases.name: career-analyze-fixed-inputs
cases.prompt: Read examples/career/jd-ai-agent-backend.md, examples/career/resume-draft.md, examples/career/target.md, internal/engine/loop.go, internal/runtime/runtime.go, and internal/tools/search_docs_tool.go. Also use file_search once for the query trace. After evidence review, call final_answer with a valid career_report JSON object containing keys summary, jd_analysis, project_evidence, resume_rewrite, interview_brief, gap_plan, risk_flags, and appendix. Include at least three project evidence claims, three resume bullets, and one risk flag. Do not claim production traffic, revenue impact, or real users unless a file proves it.
